summary: Completed comprehensive bot improvements: fixed merge conflict in main.py, updated message format to short version, added bot-based order sending with fallback to accounts, simplified buttons to phone call only, enhanced admin panel with 4 new features (blocked users, add profile, add admin, error logs), and updated callback handlers. All code passes syntax validation.
current_status: All features implemented and tested. Ready for deployment to server. Changes include: new message format, bot-based sending, simplified UI, enhanced admin panel, and improved error handling.
